rationale: All 3 containers exist; integration is additive (new Kafka subscriber on push-service for ticket.events topic). Only meaningful work: scale push-service WebSocket capacity from current 20 to 50+ concurrent agent connections. Estimated 1-2 weeks platform work. Severity is medium (not low) because push-service has not been load-tested above 30 connections — capacity is plausible but not proven.

evidence.ref: no load test results above 30 concurrent connections in push-service repo

assumptions.summary: push-service has not been load-tested above 30 concurrent connections
assumptions.validation_path: load test in staging with 50 simulated agent connections
